## Summary

- explain the user-visible or package-visible change
- note the affected workspace(s)

## Validation

- [ ] tests added or updated when practical
- [ ] docs updated if public behavior changed
- [ ] no secrets, runtime `.env` files, or generated dependency trees committed

Commands run:

```bash
# paste the commands you actually ran
```

## Release Notes

- [ ] no package or release note impact
- [ ] changeset or release-tag follow-up required
- [ ] follow-up publish/mirror work required

## Canonical Repo Reminder

The monorepo is the source of truth. Public repos are synchronized mirrors.
